Recipe: Vegan Chickpea & Spinach Frittata
Ingredient List: (1) 1 can chick peas (drained), (½) medium spinach leaves, (¼) onion, minced garlic, salt, pepper, olive oil, breadcrumbs, egg substitute, nutritional yeast (optional).

Add the garlicky spinaches, stirring occasionally, until wilted. Season with salt and peppers. Remove from heat and set aside to cool.
